name: Screencast Demo
description: Polished SaaS product demo from a raw screen recording with click zooms, laptop mockup frame, gradient backdrop, and optional ElevenLabs narration.
not_for: trending news explainers with source deck

stages.title: Demo scope
actions: Define one workflow to show start-to-finish
Write narration script aligned to click events

stages.title: Screen capture
actions: Record product flow with screen_recorder and events log
Hide system errors from end-user-facing copy

stages.title: Demo composition
actions: Run demo_video_composer with zoom-on-click and laptop frame
Generate ElevenLabs voiceover if narration requested

stages.title: QC and delivery
actions: Verify clicks are visible and narration matches UI state

qc_checks: each click has visible zoom or highlight
